content: 2024-2025 SOTA active learning agent memory can be repurposed as a dynamic, curiosity-driven queryable working memory for long-horizon Task and Motion Planning (TAMP), where the agent actively selects which high-level task constraints and low-level motion trajectories to retain or prune based on planning uncertainty, rather than storing all experienced data. This mirrors the human brain mechanism of active memory selection that inspired modern active agent memory design.
